name: Lyra & Bon Bon
description:
Lyra is a unicorn mare, she has brilliant gamboge eyes, pale, light grayish cyan mane/tails with white highlights, a very light aquamarine fur/horn & her cutie mark is a lyre.

Bon Bon is an earth pony mare, she has moderate arctic blue eyes, a moderate cobalt blue mane/tail with very light fuchsia stripes, a light apple greenish gray fur & her cutie mark is bon bon candies.
creator: Dom1990
